prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 12551→12838→12747→13723→12651，整体呈波动走势，2024 年明显后移至 13723 名，2025 年回弹至 12651 名，近两年波动幅度约 1072 名；2025 年基准位次约 12651 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 65→72→72→71→68 人，2025 年缩减至 68 人；2026 年计划 71 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 3 人（增幅约 4.4%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021 年第 30 名→2024 年第 27 名→2025 年第 25 名→2026 年第 24 名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与认可度增强，对考生吸引力上升；2024 年声誉评价为明显负面，主要因招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约 500 名；抖音热度总排名第 13（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，关注度较高，可能部分抵消负面舆情影响；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上共 7 个：作物学 A+、兽医学 A+、植物保护 A、生物学 A、畜牧学 A+、草学 A+、食品科学与工程 A+；与招生专业中的农学、动物医学类、植物保护、食品科学与工程类等高度对应，学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，农大在上述领域均有招生，带动整体报考热度；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 209000 人，较 2025 年总人数（约 212851 人）略有下降，物理类考生数估算约 137940 人（较 2025 年 139478 人微降约 1.1%），竞争压力略有缓解；中国农业大学位于北京，对西南地区考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在重庆招生占比约 2.5%（2025 年），属中等偏上水平，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年物理类计划小幅扩招（68→71 人）、软科排名持续上升至第 24 位、抖音高热关注度以及本省考生总数微降等因素，考虑学校层次提升带来的竞争加剧，小幅上调修正；预测最低位次约 13036 名，区间 12536–13536 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated around 12551→12838→12747→13723→12651, showing an overall volatile trend. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 13723, rebounding to 12651 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 1072 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12651. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 65→72→72→71→68 students, decreasing to 68 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 71 students, a slight increase of 3 students (about 4.4%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising: 30th in 2021 → 27th in 2024 → 25th in 2025 → 24th in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing attractiveness to candidates. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was significantly negative, mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission score line. Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and considerable attention, which may partially offset the negative public opinion impact. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+. These correspond highly to the enrollment majors such as Agriculture, Veterinary Medicine, Plant Protection, Food Science and Engineering, etc., with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are consistently highly recommended in society, and the Agricultural University enrolls in these fields, boosting overall application popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province for 2026 is about 209,000, slightly decreasing from about 212,851 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 137,940 (a slight decrease of about 1.1% from 139,478 in 2025), easing competition pressure. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the Southwest region. The university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), which is moderately high, and regional preference has a neutral to positive impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (68→71 students), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking to 24th, high Douyin attention, and a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province, along with increased competition due to the school's level improvement, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13036, with a range of 12536–13536.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12536–13536, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 12500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Science). If your ranking is close to the upper limit (around 13500), you should mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2, to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1725→1897→2551→2320→2422, showing an overall backward trend. In 2023, it significantly shifted back to 2551, then slightly recovered to 2320 in 2024, and shifted back again to 2422 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 525 places, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 2422. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 17→17→18→20→28 students, with a significant expansion to 28 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 28 students, unchanged from 2025, and the stable plan has a neutral impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen to 24th in 2026, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and brand effect, which also attracts liberal arts students. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was significantly negative (poor admission communication led to a sharp drop in admission cutoffs), but this mainly affected the Science Category. The History Category has not seen obvious admission anomalies in recent years. Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), with relatively high overall attention. The university's advantageous disciplines are mainly agriculture, forestry, and life sciences, while the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Business Administration, Economics, Communication, Sociology, English, etc.) do not directly correspond to the university's A+ disciplines, but the 985 platform provides overall support for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended, Business Administration is differentiated and wait-and-see, Economics is differentiated and wait-and-see, Communication is significantly discouraged. The estimated number of History Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 71,060 (a decrease of about 3.1% from 73,373 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for liberal arts examinees in the southwestern region. The university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing's History Category is about 2.5%, and regional preference has a neutral to slightly positive impact on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2026 History Category enrollment plan being unchanged from 2025, a slight decrease in the number of provincial History Category examinees, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, the slight reduction in examinees eases competition, leading to a minor downward adjustment. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2392, with a range of 2033–2751.
